title: Trump picks housing Dir. Bill Pulte as acting intelligence chief, replacing Tulsi Gabbard
summary: Trump has selected Bill Pulte, previously the housing director, to serve as acting intelligence chief, replacing Tulsi Gabbard. This represents a significant personnel change in the administration's intelligence leadership. The shift may signal potential changes in intelligence priorities and approach.

zh.title: 特朗普选择前住房主任比尔·普尔特为代理情报局长，替换塔尔西·加巴德
zh.summary: 特朗普已选定前住房主任比尔·普尔特担任代理情报局长，替换塔尔西·加巴德。这代表了行政部门情报领导层的一次重大人事变动。这一变化可能预示着情报优先事项和方法的潜在改变。

title: Homeowners insurance premiums have soared in recent years. How to reduce your costs
summary: Homeowners insurance premiums have increased substantially in recent years, creating financial pressure for property owners nationwide. Experts say policyholders can take actionable steps to reduce their costs, such as improving home safety, bundling policies, or shopping for better rates. These measures may provide meaningful relief from rising insurance expenses.
content: Insurance premiums have soared for many homeowners in recent years, but there are steps policyholders can take to reduce them, experts said.

zh.title: 近年来房屋保险费用飙升。如何降低成本
zh.summary: 近年来房屋保险费用大幅上升，给全国房屋业主造成了经济压力。专家表示，投保人可以采取行动降低成本，例如改善住宅安全、捆绑保单或寻找更优惠的费率。这些措施可能会为不断上升的保险费用提供有意义的缓解。

title: ‘I have no preexisting conditions’: I’m 56, earn $198,000 and want to retire early. Can I afford private healthcare?
summary: A 56-year-old earning $198,000 annually is considering early retirement and questioning whether private healthcare is affordable without employer coverage. The article explores the financial viability of FIRE while managing healthcare costs in the absence of traditional benefits. This reflects broader concerns about healthcare accessibility for early retirees.
content: “I’m trying to figure out whether it’s worth my while achieving FIRE.”

zh.title: "我没有任何既往病史"：我今年56岁，年收入19.8万美元，想提早退休。我能负担得起私人医疗保健吗？
zh.summary: 一位56岁、年收入19.8万美元的人正在考虑提早退休，并质疑在没有雇主保险的情况下是否能够负担得起私人医疗保健。该文章探讨了在没有传统福利情况下管理医疗费用的财务独立提前退休（FIRE）的可行性。这反映了关于早期退休者医疗可及性的更广泛关切。

title: Silicon Valley was built on public money — now it’s fighting California’s billionaire tax
summary: Silicon Valley's tech industry, which benefited from public infrastructure and government funding, is now resisting California's proposed billionaire tax. Tech leaders reportedly view taxation as something for ordinary citizens rather than the wealthy elite. The resistance highlights a philosophical divide between public investment and private wealth accumulation.
content: “Cyberselfish” author says tech elite believe that taxes are for “little people.”

zh.title: 硅谷建立在公共资金之上——现在它正在对抗加州的亿万富翁税
zh.summary: 硅谷科技产业曾受益于公共基础设施和政府资金，现在正在抵制加州提议的亿万富翁税。据报道，科技领袖将税收视为普通公民而非富有精英的责任。这种抵制凸显了公共投资与私人财富积累之间的哲学分歧。

title: It’s official: More money is now spent building data centers than the government spends on transportation
summary: Private investment in data center construction has surpassed government spending on transportation infrastructure, marking a significant economic milestone revealed in the Census Bureau's April construction report. This crossover point reflects the growing dominance of AI and cloud computing in capital allocation decisions. The shift demonstrates how economic priorities have fundamentally changed in recent years.
content: A notable milestone was quietly reached in the April construction-spending report released by the Census Bureau on Monday: Construction spending on data centers overtook public spending on transportation.

zh.title: 官方确认：现在花在建设数据中心上的资金超过了政府在交通运输上的支出
zh.summary: 私人对数据中心建设的投资已经超过了政府对交通基础设施的支出，这是人口普查局四月建设报告公布的重要经济里程碑。这个交叉点反映了人工智能和云计算在资本配置决策中日益增长的主导地位。这一转变表明经济优先事项在近年已根本改变。

title: Many Americans now need $20,000 in an emergency savings fund. Yes, really.
summary: Financial advisors now recommend Americans maintain $20,000 in emergency savings, significantly higher than traditional three-month cash buffer guidance. The rising recommendation reflects inflation and increased living costs that have made conventional financial rules obsolete. A larger emergency fund is increasingly necessary to weather unexpected expenses.
content: The old rules of thumb are broken — here is why a three-month cash buffer is ‘almost dangerous’

zh.title: 许多美国人现在需要在紧急储蓄基金中存储2万美元。是的，真的。
zh.summary: 财务顾问现在建议美国人保持2万美元的紧急储蓄，远高于传统的三个月现金储备建议。不断上升的建议反映了通货膨胀和生活成本增加，使传统财务规则已过时。更大的紧急基金对于应对意外开支越来越必要。

title: Americans are using buy-now-pay-later for gas and groceries, showing just how expensive daily necessities are now
summary: Rising gas and grocery prices are forcing Americans to turn to buy-now-pay-later services for essential daily purchases, indicating severe affordability strain. Gas prices have increased by more than $1 per gallon compared to the previous year's average. This trend underscores how inflation is pushing basic necessities out of reach for many households.
content: With gas prices up more than $1 a gallon from last year’s average, Americans are turning to buy-now-pay-later at the pump.

zh.title: 美国人使用"先买后付"服务购买汽油和杂货，显示日常必需品现已多么昂贵
zh.summary: 不断上升的汽油和杂货价格迫使美国人转向"先买后付"服务来购买日常必需品，表明存在严重的负担能力压力。与前一年平均价格相比，汽油价格上升了超过1美元/加仑。这一趋势突显了通货膨胀如何将基本必需品推出许多家庭的承受范围。

title: Another dire problem for Social Security: Trustees may be calculating the birth rate wrong
summary: Social Security trustees may be using incorrect birth rate calculations, potentially misrepresenting the program's long-term financial outlook. Demographic assumptions are critical to projecting Social Security's solvency, and errors could underestimate future funding challenges. This raises questions about the accuracy of official projections for the program's sustainability.
content: Don’t expect a baby boom to save Social Security.

zh.title: 社会保障的又一个严峻问题：受托人可能在错误地计算出生率
zh.summary: 社会保障受托人可能在使用不正确的出生率计算，可能会错误表示该计划的长期财务前景。人口统计假设对于预测社会保障的偿付能力至关重要，错误可能会低估未来的资金挑战。这提出了关于该计划可持续性的官方预测准确性的问题。

title: We're right-sizing our position in an AI stock after its impressive run this year
summary: An investment portfolio is reducing its position in a high-performing AI stock that has surged significantly throughout the year. The adjustment comes as the holding has grown to an outsized portion of the portfolio due to strong performance. This represents a strategy of profit-taking and rebalancing after substantial gains.
content: Our position has swelled after the stock's strong rally since its last quarter.

zh.title: 在今年表现出色后，我们正在调整人工智能股票的头寸规模
zh.summary: 一个投资组合正在减少其在一只在全年显著上升的高表现人工智能股票中的头寸。由于强劲的表现，该持仓已增长到投资组合的过大部分，因此进行了调整。这代表了在获得实质性收益后的获利了结和重新平衡的策略。

title: The federal government plans to make it harder for you to sue your employer over alternative 401(k) investment options
summary: The Department of Labor has proposed new guidelines that would limit workers' ability to sue employers over alternative investment options in workplace retirement plans. The proposal outlines six factors employers should consider when offering alternative investments. This regulatory shift could significantly reduce legal recourse for workers unhappy with their 401(k) investment choices.
content: The Department of Labor’s proposal suggests six factors employers should consider when offering alternative investments in workplace retirement plans.

zh.title: 联邦政府计划让员工更难就替代性401(k)投资选项起诉雇主
zh.summary: 劳工部提议了新的指导方针，限制员工就工作场所退休计划中的替代投资选项起诉雇主的能力。该提案列出了雇主在提供替代投资时应考虑的六个因素。这一监管转变可能会大大减少对其401(k)投资选择不满意的员工的法律救济。

title: Why the most important company enabling AI isn’t Nvidia, according to this fund manager
summary: A fund manager argues that a company other than Nvidia is the most critical enabler in the AI industry landscape, outperforming competitors in the AI supply chain. This perspective challenges the conventional wisdom that Nvidia is singularly dominant as the most important AI infrastructure company. Identifying lesser-known winners in AI infrastructure could inform investment strategy.
content: Portfolio manager Jonathan Cofsky talks about where to find the winners in the AI landscape and one company that is beating all comers.

zh.title: 根据这位基金经理的说法，推动人工智能发展最重要的公司不是英伟达
zh.summary: 一位基金经理辩称，英伟达以外的另一家公司是人工智能行业中最关键的推动者，在人工智能供应链中的表现超过了竞争对手。这一观点挑战了英伟达是人工智能基础设施中最重要公司的传统观点。识别人工智能基础设施中的不太知名的赢家可能会为投资策略提供信息。

title: Victoria Secret shares spike 40% after big earnings beat, raised sales outlook
summary: Victoria's Secret stock surged 40% following a better-than-expected earnings report and an optimistic sales forecast. CEO Hillary Super attributed the company's turnaround success to winning over younger shoppers across various income levels. The strong performance marks a significant milestone in the company's recent revival efforts.
content: Victoria's Secret has been in the midst of a turnaround under CEO Hillary Super, who said the company is winning over young shoppers across all incomes.

zh.title: 维多利亚的秘密股票在大幅超过盈利预期和提高销售展望后上涨40%
zh.summary: 维多利亚的秘密股票在超过预期的财报和乐观的销售预测后上涨了40%。首席执行官希拉里·苏珀将公司的转折成功归因于赢得了各种收入水平的年轻购物者。这一强劲表现标志着该公司近期复兴努力中的一个重要里程碑。

title: Polymarket closes its first block trade as prediction markets push for Wall Street adoption
summary: Polymarket, a prediction market platform, has completed its first block trade as these platforms seek to expand beyond retail investors to institutional traders. The move represents a strategic pivot toward Wall Street adoption and institutional participation. Prediction markets are positioning themselves as an emerging asset class for traditional financial institutions.
content: Prediction market platforms have increasingly looked to institutional traders, not individual ones, as the next venue for growth.

zh.title: Polymarket完成首笔区块交易，预测市场争取华尔街采纳
zh.summary: 预测市场平台Polymarket完成了首笔区块交易，这些平台正在寻求将投资者范围扩展至机构交易者。此举代表了向华尔街采纳和机构参与的战略转变。预测市场正在自我定位为传统金融机构的新兴资产类别。

title: Here are Tuesday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Alphabet, Ferrari, Take-Two, TripAdvisor & more
summary: Wall Street analysts issued major calls on stocks including Nvidia, Alphabet, Ferrari, Take-Two, and TripAdvisor, influencing market sentiment and trading activity. These analyst recommendations span significant technology, luxury goods, and travel companies. Major market-moving calls from analysts typically direct institutional and retail investor attention.
content: Here are Tuesday's biggest calls on Wall Street.

zh.title: 周二最大分析师观点：英伟达、谷歌、法拉利、Take-Two、TripAdvisor等
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师对包括英伟达、谷歌、法拉利、Take-Two和TripAdvisor在内的股票发表了重大观点，影响市场情绪和交易活动。这些分析师建议涵盖重要的科技、奢侈品和旅游公司。分析师的主要市场驱动性观点通常引导机构和散户投资者的关注。

title: My husband and I are 75. We have $1.5 million in stocks and $425,000 in savings. Is that too much cash?
summary: A retired couple at age 75 with $1.5 million in stocks and $425,000 in cash savings are questioning whether their cash allocation is optimal for their stage of life. Both are debt-free, with the husband receiving 80% salary replacement in retirement, providing stable income. The article addresses asset allocation and cash positioning strategies for retirees.
content: “We are debt-free, and he will get 80% of his salary when he retires.”

zh.title: 我和丈夫都75岁。我们有150万美元的股票和42.5万美元的储蓄。现金太多了吗？
zh.summary: 一对75岁的退休夫妇拥有150万美元的股票和42.5万美元的现金储蓄，正在质疑他们的现金配置对其人生阶段是否最优。两人无债务，丈夫在退休后获得80%的薪资替代率，提供稳定收入。该文章讨论了退休人士的资产配置和现金定位策略。

title: European stocks rebound as investors await key inflation data; Abivax shares tumble
summary: European stocks are rebounding as investors await key inflation data that could shed light on economic impacts of U.S.-Iran tensions. French biotech Abivax shares are tumbling amid this market uncertainty. The mixed movements reflect investor caution balancing positive equity sentiment against geopolitical concerns.
content: Investors are awaiting data that will shed further light on the economic impact of the U.S.-Iran war.

zh.title: 欧洲股市反弹，投资者静待关键通胀数据；Abivax股价暴跌
zh.summary: 欧洲股市正在反弹，投资者静待关键通胀数据，这可能会阐明美伊紧张局势对经济的影响。法国生物技术公司Abivax在市场不确定性中股价暴跌。这些混合波动反映了投资者在积极股票情绪与地缘政治风险之间寻求平衡的谨慎态度。

title: Biotech takeover target Abivax sinks over 30% after bowel disease drug trial update
summary: French biotech Abivax experienced a significant 32% share price decline following updated trial data on its lead bowel disease drug. The sharp drop suggests the trial update may have missed investor expectations or revealed efficacy concerns. This decline jeopardizes the company's status as a potential takeover target.
content: Shares of French biotech Abivax tumbled 32% after it reported fresh data on its lead asset.

zh.title: 生物技术并购目标Abivax在肠道疾病药物试验更新后下跌超过30%
zh.summary: 法国生物技术公司Abivax因其主导肠道疾病药物的试验数据更新而经历了显著的32%股价下跌。急剧下跌表明该试验更新可能未达到投资者预期或揭示了疗效问题。这一跌幅危及该公司作为潜在并购目标的地位。

title: Steph Curry signs with Chinese brand after Under Armour split
summary: NBA star Stephen Curry has signed a partnership with Chinese sportswear brand Li-Ning following his split with Under Armour. The deal reflects Chinese companies' strategic push to build global brand presence through partnerships with prominent athletes. This move marks a significant shift in Curry's endorsement portfolio and signals Li-Ning's international ambitions.
content: Chinese firms have been vying to secure deals with big stars as they push to become global brands.

zh.title: 库里与安德玛分手后与中国品牌签约
zh.summary: NBA球星斯蒂芬·库里在与安德玛分手后与中国运动品牌李宁签署了合作协议。这笔交易反映了中国公司通过与著名运动员的合作来建立全球品牌影响力的战略努力。这一举动标志着库里代言组合的重大转变，也表明了李宁的国际野心。

title: Amazon's four-day Prime Day event starts June 23, as shoppers battle inflation
summary: Amazon is launching its four-day Prime Day sale starting June 23, coinciding with record-low U.S. consumer sentiment in May. The retail event targets cost-conscious shoppers grappling with inflation and reduced purchasing power. This timing reflects retailers' efforts to stimulate spending amid economic headwinds.
content: Amazon's four-day shopping fest comes after U.S. consumer sentiment dropped in May to a record low.

zh.title: 亚马逊四天Prime Day活动6月23日启动，购物者与通货膨胀作对
zh.summary: 亚马逊将从6月23日启动为期四天的Prime Day促销，与美国5月创纪录低迷的消费者情绪相吻合。该零售活动针对在通货膨胀和购买力下降中苦苦挣扎的成本意识购物者。这个时机反映了零售商在经济逆风中刺激支出的努力。

title: Trump administration proposes 25% tariff on Brazilian goods over unfair trade practices
summary: The Trump administration has proposed a 25% tariff on Brazilian goods under Section 301 investigation authority, citing unfair trade practices. U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer initiated the proposal at President Trump's direction. The move escalates trade tensions and could significantly impact bilateral trade relations.
content: U.S Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said that the investigation under Section 301 was launched at the direction of U.S. President Donald Trump.

zh.title: 特朗普政府因不公平贸易做法对巴西商品征收25%关税
zh.summary: 特朗普政府根据第301条调查权对巴西商品提议征收25%关税，理由是不公平的贸易做法。美国贸易代表詹姆森·格里尔按照特朗普总统的指示提出了这项提议。此举升级了贸易紧张局势，可能会对双边贸易关系产生重大影响。

title: London Tube strikes go ahead after talks fail
summary: London Underground workers represented by the RMT union are striking on Tuesday over working hours disputes after negotiations failed. Additional strike action is scheduled for Thursday, signaling continued labor tensions. The strikes will severely disrupt London's public transportation system.
content: Members of the RMT union are on strike on Tuesday in a row over working hours, with further action planned for Thursday.

zh.title: 谈判失败后伦敦地铁罢工继续进行
zh.summary: 由英铁路、海事和运输工会（RMT）代表的伦敦地铁工人周二因工作时间纠纷罢工，谈判失败。周四还安排了额外的罢工行动，表明劳动紧张局势持续。这些罢工将严重中断伦敦的公共交通系统。

title: Blackstone closes its largest Asia private equity fund at over $13 billion
summary: Blackstone has closed its largest Asia-focused private equity fund with $13.1 billion in commitments, exceeding the firm's previous regional fundraising records. The substantial fund size reflects strong institutional investor appetite for Asian private equity opportunities. This achievement underscores Blackstone's dominant position in the region's private equity market.
content: Blackstone raised $13.1 billion for its latest Asia private equity vehicle, marking the largest private equity fundraise the firm has done in the region.

zh.title: 黑石集团亚洲私募股权基金融资超130亿美元创历史纪录
zh.summary: 黑石集团宣布其亚洲最大私募股权基金成功收盘，承诺资金超过131亿美元，刷新公司在该地区的融资纪录。该基金规模的扩大反映了机构投资者对亚洲私募股权机会的强劲需求。这一成就凸显了黑石集团在该地区私募股权市场中的主导地位。

title: NBA star Stephen Curry partners with Chinese sportswear giant Li-Ning
summary: NBA star Stephen Curry has partnered with Chinese sportswear giant Li-Ning for product development and sports culture initiatives. The partnership extends beyond merchandise to include broader sports culture engagement as Li-Ning pursues global expansion. Curry will serve as a key ambassador for the Chinese brand's international growth.
content: Stephen Curry has entered into a partnership with Li-Ning, which would involve product development as well as sports culture initiatives.

zh.title: NBA明星库里与中国运动品牌李宁达成合作
zh.summary: NBA明星斯蒂芬·库里已与中国运动品牌巨头李宁达成合作，共同开发产品和推进体育文化计划。该合作不仅限于商品销售，还包括更广泛的体育文化参与，李宁借此推进全球扩张。库里将成为这个中国品牌国际增长的关键大使。

title: Blue Origin launchpad damaged in rocket explosion may not be restored until 2028, NASA's Isaacman says
summary: Blue Origin's launchpad was damaged in a rocket explosion and may not be operational until 2028, affecting NASA's Artemis program which relies on the company for multiple contracts. This delay could significantly impact the timeline for the agency's return-to-the-moon efforts.
content: NASA has tapped Jeff Bezos' Blue Origin for several contracts in the agency's Artemis return-to-the-moon program.

zh.title: Blue Origin发射台在火箭爆炸中受损，可能要到2028年才能修复，NASA的Isaacman说
zh.summary: Blue Origin的发射台在火箭爆炸中受损，可能要到2028年才能投入使用，这将影响NASA的阿尔忒弥斯项目，该项目依赖该公司进行多个合同。这一延迟可能会严重影响该机构重返月球努力的时间表。

title: HPE’s stock soars toward record gain as earnings show a networking bonanza
summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise's stock is approaching record highs driven by strong earnings results. The company is benefiting from intense demand for networking equipment and servers fueled by AI infrastructure buildout.
content: The artificial-intelligence buildout is driving intense demand for networking and servers, and Hewlett Packard Enterprise is reaping the rewards.

zh.title: 随着财报显示网络产品销售旺盛，HPE股价飙升至历史高位
zh.summary: 惠普企业公司的股票因强劲的财报结果而接近历史高位。该公司正从AI基础设施建设带来的网络设备和服务器强劲需求中受益。

title: Alphabet asks shareholders to foot an $80 billion bill for AI expansion
summary: Alphabet is raising $80 billion through a stock offering to fund AI expansion, with Berkshire Hathaway participating with a $10 billion investment. This represents a major capital commitment to AI infrastructure and development.
content: Berkshire Hathaway is buying Alphabet’s stock at a discount as part of a newly announced equity offering.

zh.title: Alphabet要求股东为80亿美元的AI扩张买单
zh.summary: Alphabet通过股票发行筹集80亿美元来资助AI扩张，其中伯克希尔哈撒韦公司参与投资10亿美元。这代表了对AI基础设施和开发的重大资本承诺。

title: Asia-Pacific stocks open lower as uncertainty over U.S.-Iran peace talks dents sentiment
summary: Asia-Pacific markets opened mixed Tuesday as investors reacted to renewed uncertainty surrounding U.S.-Iran peace negotiations. Geopolitical concerns weighed on regional market sentiment.
content: Asia-Pacific markets open mixed on Tuesday as investors weighed renewed uncertainty over U.S.-Iran peace negotiations.

zh.title: 随着美伊和平谈判不确定性打击市场情绪，亚太股市低开
zh.summary: 亚太市场周二开盘不一，投资者对美伊和平谈判重新出现的不确定性做出反应。地缘政治担忧对地区市场情绪造成了压力。

title: Tuesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: Tech stocks led a market rally that lifted the S&P 500 to a new all-time high on Monday, despite headwinds from rising oil prices. The index closed at a record level, signaling sustained investor appetite for equities.
content: A rally in tech stocks helped the market overcome the drag of higher oil prices and lifted the S&P 500 to a new all-time high and a closing record Monday.

zh.title: 周二的大事件：下一个交易时段可能推动市场的因素
zh.summary: 科技股引领了市场反弹，尽管受到油价上升的阻力，但将标普500指数推升至新的历史高点。该指数以纪录水平收盘，表明投资者对股票的持续需求。
